overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a long coat walking through a rainy night-time urban environment resembling London. The character navigates wet streets, passes brick warehouses, crosses intersections, and enters a futuristic covered walkway before continuing through neon-lit city streets.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wet sidewalk next to brick warehouse, passing parked vehicles

sleek black vehicle parked along the curb with reflective wet surface
illuminated yellow posters mounted on the brick wall
tall street light illuminating the wet pavement
contemporary building with illuminated windows visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet sidewalk beside a brick warehouse building at night. A black sports car is parked on the right, and yellow posters are visible on the wall to the left. The street is illuminated by artificial lighting with a modern building visible in the distance.

events.description: character turns left at street corner into narrower passage

agents.ego_description: turning left at the corner and proceeding through a darker alleyway with construction barriers

dark wall covered with white graffiti tags
chain link fencing along the left side of the alley

segments.scene_description: The character turns left at the corner into a darker, narrower passage lined with red and white construction barriers. The brick warehouse recedes behind as the character enters an alleyway with graffiti-covered walls and metal fencing.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with underground station entrance

events.description: character crosses the street at crosswalk approaching futuristic structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a street intersection featuring a London Underground station sign on the left. After crossing the road, the character walks toward a futuristic, illuminated kiosk entrance while pedestrians and vehicles move through the area.

events.description: character enters futuristic covered walkway with metallic flooring and digital screens
character exits covered walkway into open intersection with yellow grid road markings

illuminated screens showing maps and information

segments.scene_description: The character enters a futuristic covered walkway featuring glowing digital displays and metallic flooring. After a brief passage through the covered area, the character emerges into a large intersection marked with yellow grid lines and approaches a building illuminated with red neon lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a building with prominent red neon lighting, continuing down the wet city street

notable_agents.action: walking with umbrella on the opposite side of the street

entered.detail: older brick architecture with large windows adjacent to the red-lit structure
black public waste bins on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sidewalk beside a building illuminated with striking red neon lights. The wet pavement reflects the ambient lighting as the character continues down the street, passing other pedestrians and urban infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban environment that transforms from a quiet industrial perimeter into a vibrant, neon-lit city center. It begins with the character walking along a wet sidewalk beside a brick warehouse and a parked sports car, before turning left into a narrower, darker passage lined with construction barriers and graffiti-covered walls. As the character emerges from the alley, the scene opens into a busy street intersection marked by a London Underground sign and the movement of pedestrians and vehicles. The camera then follows the character through a futuristic covered walkway filled with glowing digital displays and metallic flooring, which leads directly into a wide intersection with yellow grid lines. Finally, the environment shifts into a high-contrast cityscape as the character walks beside buildings bathed in striking red neon lights that reflect vividly off the wet pavement.
